name: Morphling
description: You only miss the water when the well runs dry. Morphling The morphed illusion is a strong illusion that deals as much damage as Morphling and receives additional incoming damage.

abilities.name: Waveform
abilities.description: Spell / Magical / Attack Damage / Physical attacks all enemy units within its damage radius while traveling. Neither applies on-hit effects nor attack modifiers.

abilities.name: Adaptive Strike
abilities.description: The damage component is based on Morphling's. If Morphling's agility is much higher than strength, the max agility damage factor is used. The knockback and stun component is based on Morphling's. If Morphling's strength is much higher than agility, the max knockback distance is used.

abilities.name: Morph
abilities.description: Creates a strong illusion of the targeted enemy hero that can cast all of the affected enemy's basic abilities with Alt-Cast toggled on. The morphed illusion is a strong illusion that deals as much damage as Morphling and receives additional incoming damage.
